visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Set Bit Counting
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `count_set_bits` function uses a `while` loop with bit manipulation. Refactor it to use more efficient Pythonic built-ins for counting bits, which are highly optimized for this task.

solution.explanation: In Python, `bin(n).count('1')` is a very fast way to count the set bits (population count) of an integer because `bin()` and `count()` are implemented in highly optimized C. This is more readable and efficient for most use cases in Python.
